# Architecture

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS ‚Äî Current state

### Style
Plugin for Claude Code CLI: 3 hooks (enforcement) + 1 agent (worker) + 3 commands (routers) + 1 skill (rule source).

### Package layout
```
caveman-docs/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hooks/                         # Node.js + bash ‚Äî hook scripts and installer
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ caveman-docs-activate.js   # SessionStart: emit SKILL.md body, create flag
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ caveman-docs-tracker.js    # UserPromptSubmit: detect AI-doc-write intent
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ caveman-docs-pre-write.js  # PreToolUse Write|Edit: match AI doc paths
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ install.sh                 # Atomic settings.json mutation + backup
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ uninstall.sh               # Remove caveman-docs entries
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json               # "type": "commonjs"
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ commands/                      # Slash-command routers (markdown frontmatter)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ init.md                    # /caveman-docs:init ‚Üí scope=init
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ai-context.md              # /caveman-docs:ai-context ‚Üí scope=full
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ compress.md                # /caveman-docs:compress ‚Üí scope=compress
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ agents/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ doc-compressor.md          # Worker: generates/compresses AI docs
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ skills/caveman-docs/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ SKILL.md                   # Compression ruleset (10 rules + examples)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ AGENTS.md                      # This plugin's own AI entry point
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CLAUDE.md                      # Claude Code redirect
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ README.md                      # Human-facing (exempt from compression)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ LICENSE                        # GPLv3
```

### Layer responsibilities

| Layer | Owns | Does NOT own |
|-------|------|--------------|
| Hooks | Interception, path matching, reminder injection, flag file | Generation, compression logic |
| Skill | Compression rules, scope definition, examples | Runtime behavior |
| Commands | Router frontmatter, target resolution, flag parsing | File generation |
| Agent | Scope dispatch (init/full/compress), file read/write, idempotent overwrites | Hook wiring, VCS ops |
| `install.sh` | settings.json mutation, file copy, backup | Hook logic |

### External integration points

| System | Client | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Claude Code CLI hooks API | `caveman-docs-*.js` via stdin JSON | Emit `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext` |
| `~/.claude/settings.json` | `hooks/install.sh` via `node -e` | Atomic via `.bak` + `JSON.stringify` rewrite |
| Filesystem (user repos) | `doc-compressor` agent via Read/Write/Edit | Respect AI doc scope; never touch exempt files |

## TO BE ‚Äî Prescribed pattern

No ADRs in scope. Current state is prescriptive.
